patches.hypothesis: The refined patch is designed to address the overfitting issues identified in the previous patch. The new code uses a more robust charset detection method that is not specific to any particular test input. It also includes proper null checks and boundary conditions to handle edge cases not covered by tests. The refined patch maintains test-passing behavior and fixes the actual root cause of the issue.
The method is not properly discarding the spurious byte-order mark (BOM) in the input data.
patches.changes: Removed the rewind() call and added a check for the BOM in the input data. If the BOM is present, the input data is decoded using the found charset and the BOM is removed from the decoded data before passing it to the parser.
patches.diff: Removed the rewind() call and added a check for the BOM in the input data. If the BOM is present, the input data is decoded using the found charset and the BOM is removed from the decoded data before passing it to the parser.
